data.biography:
Arata Furuta (古田 新太 Furuta Arata, born as Takafumi Furuta on December 3, 1965 in Kobe) is a Japanese theatre and movie actor.

Furata has a broad range that goes from playing serious salary men, to bushi in period drama roles, and even women.
data.name: Arata Furuta

data.biography: 古田新太（假名：ふるた あらた）本名古田岳史（假名：ふるた たけふみ），愛稱古ちん，是日本演員、配音演員、唱片騎士。
data.name: 古田新太

data.biography: 古田新太（假名：ふるた あらた）本名古田岳史（假名：ふるた たけふみ），爱称古ちん，1965年12月03日出生于日本兵库县神户市，是日本演员、配音演员、唱片骑士。
data.name: 古田新太

data.biography: 古田新太，本名古田岳史，愛稱古ちん，是日本演員、配音演員、唱片騎士。
data.name: 古田新太

data.biography: Takefumi Furuta (古田 岳史 Furuta Takefumi, Kōbe, Prefectura de Hyōgo, 3 de diciembre de 1965), mejor conocido bajo su nombre artístico de Arata Furuta (古田 新太 Furuta Arata), es un actor, seiyū y DJ japonés, afiliado a Cube Inc.​ Furuta estuvo casado alguno años con la también actriz Yayoi Nishihata, con quien tuvo una hija en 1994.
data.name: Arata Furuta

data.biography:
Plan attended Dusit Thani College. Apart from being an actor, Plan is a member of the project group "TEMPT". They released their first single called "Tell me this is love" on July 24th of 2019.

Plan made his acting debut in the 2016 series "Make It Right: The Series" playing Wit, the best friend of the main character, Fuse. In 2018, he gained popularity when he portrayed Can in "Love By Chance" alongside "Mean" Phiravich Attachitsataporn. The pair soon became popular for their portrayal of their characters and landed a spin-off.

Today, Plan is an artist under TV Thunder.
data.name: Rathavit Kijworalak
รัฐวิทย์ กิจวรลักษณ์
